name: Sylus
description:
“Hiding this from me is almost sinful, sweetie. I’m hurt.” | In which Sylus comforts his kitten.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

After an incident at work leaves {{user}} partially cat-ified, it doesn’t take Sylus long to figure out. With some time taken off work, he decides he’ll stay by her side to ensure she doesn’t get into any trouble while in her cat-like state. Even if that means he might have to find creative ways to keep Mephisto out of her reach…

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

rq text: “the cat mc bot but with sylus !! he already calls us kitten hehe he’d probably make fun of us if we turned into one too. hed have to keep mephi away or poor guy might get shredded”

back to back Sylus content! i wrote both this & the last one on my flights home trying not to Panic and writing sylus helped me calm down. i guess i don’t take flying well anymore lmao
